description: A color photograph from the same TrumpRx event as the companion image in this tweet. A close-up shows Donald Trump smiling broadly at a podium bearing the gold Seal of the President of the United States, wearing a navy suit, white shirt, purple patterned tie and American-flag lapel pin, with a gooseneck microphone in front of him. To the right, businessman Mark Cuban (smiling, open-collar white shirt under a blue blazer) looks on. The blurred background shows a presidential flag and the partial gold 'Trum...' (TrumpRx) backdrop text that is part of the physical stage set. There is no graphic/text overlay; this is a candid event photograph, not a designed meme. It accompanies the tweet promoting the TrumpRx.gov drug-pricing program.
notable_text: (partial 'Trum...'/TrumpRx backdrop text only; no graphic overlay)
